top_signals.title: Zalando Plunges After German Regulator Starts Accounts Probe
top_signals.summary: Zalando SE plunged after Germany’s financial regulator said it launched a probe into the online fashion retailer’s 2025 report over a suspected violation of accounting rules.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Set to Boost Cash Placed in State Banks to $22 Billion
top_signals.summary: The Indonesian government will put an estimated 400 trillion rupiah ($22 billion) of its standby funds in state-owned lenders to keep on fueling economic growth, according to its finance chief.
